from datetime import datetime, timezone

def build_audit_record(event):
    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
    return {
        "event_id": event["id"],
        "type": event["type"],
        "created_at": now,
        "updated_at": now,
        "processed_at": now,
        "data": event["payload"],
    }

def create_batch_records(items):
    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
    records = []
    for item in items:
        records.append({
            "name": item["name"],
            "created_at": now,
            "expires_at": now,
        })
    return records
